title: T-018 — API: Manufacturing operation allergen additions CRUD
prompt: Implement /api/technical/manufacturing-operations/allergens endpoints per §10.4 and TEC-042. GET lists by manufacturing_operation_name. POST creates (manufacturing_operation_name, allergen_code, reason). DELETE by composite key. Validate manufacturing_operation_name in reference_tables.manufacturing_operations.row_key (per V-TEC-63). Permission technical.allergens.edit. RED tests/api/manufacturing-op-allergens.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/manufacturing-op-allergens.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: CRUD on manufacturing_operation_allergen_additions table with reference_table FK validation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Used by allergen cascade rule when computing FG allergens (UNION RM allergens via BOM components + manufacturing operation allergens added). Org-scoped with RLS.
acceptance_criteria: Given POST with manufacturing_operation_name not in reference_table, when validated, then 422 V-TEC-63.
Given valid POST, when GET runs, then row appears for that manufacturing_operation_name.
Given DELETE, when audit_log queried, then action='manufacturing_op.allergen.delete' exists.
test_strategy: RED tests for FK validation + audit.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow ad-hoc manufacturing_operation_name values — must reference Reference table.
